subject: Re: Reporty advances report re New Investment
body:
Hi Ehud,
Unfotunately I only land at 5pm- Good luck for the meeting!
Any chance we can get together later?
Best
NJ

-----Original Message-----
From: ehbarak [mailto:ehbarak1@gmail.com] 
Sent: lundi 22 février 2016 19:56
To: Nicole Junkermann | Junkermanngroup 
Subject: Re: Reporty advances report re New Investment

Hi Nicole,
I think we will have to delay the dinner for Berlin or London. But how about meeting tomorrow by noon at The Mark hotel restaurant or bar. It's 77th/Madison. 
I can bring Amir some 30min later. On 1pm we have there a meeting with two guys we'd never met, who are seniors in a new Investment Fund owned by Peter Thiel and JE. They are interested in hearing about Reporty. It could be great to have you with us. 
If you can't do it at noon, please give me a place and time were we can meet later tomorrow, before you leave. 
Looking forward. 
Best
EB

Sent from my iPhone

> 
> Hi Ehud,
> Can we see each other tm night? Would love to invite you for dinner if 
> you have time if not we see each other beforehand I leave it to you to 
> invite Amir Best NJ
>

> 
> Hi Nicole
> Yes, I am. Till March 3. 
> I think Amir, the CEO, should also be here in NY next week. 
> Stay in touch and we can meet. 
> Best
> EB
> 
> Sent from my iPhone
>

subject: Re: Reporty advances report re New Investment
body:
Thank you Ehud let me know if we can be of any help.
I am in NY next week are you ny any chance there?
Best
NJ

Sent from my BlackBerry 10 smartphone.
  Original Message
From: ehbarak
Sent: Donnerstag, 18. Februar 2016 20:30
To: Epstein Jeffrey; Nicole Junkermann | Junkermanngroup
Subject: Reporty advances report re New Investment

Hi Jeff and Nicole,
Pl find attached the report which the start up had to give us, approved by Prof. Kaminka our scientific adviser, before we pass the New .5M.
 I went with them, one by one through all points. Reporty is basically moving faster than how I assumed they will. So, I ordered today to transfer the New .5M to their account.
The real test will come ,as NJ duly noted, when the branding challenge will turn crucial. (Scalability is there, already embedded, all along the way into the project).
Looking forward
EB
body_html:
Thank you Ehud let me know if we can be of any help.
I am in NY next week are you ny any chance there?
Best

Sent from my BlackBerry 10 smartphone.
Original Message
From: ehbarak
Sent: Donnerstag, 18. Februar 2016 20:30
To: Epstein Jeffrey; Nicole Junkermann | Junkermanngroup
Subject: Reporty advances report re New Investment


Hi Jeff and Nicole,
Pl find attached the report which the start up had to give us, approved by Prof. Kaminka our scientific adviser, before we pass the New .5M.
I went with them, one by one through all points. Reporty is basically moving faster than how I assumed they will. So, I ordered today to transfer the New .5M to their account.
The real test will come ,as NJ duly noted, when the branding challenge will turn crucial. (Scalability is there, already embedded, all along the way into the project).
Looking forward
EB
